Professional portfolio

Software-minded Test Analyst with a love for systems, analysis and clean digital experiences.

I currently work as a Test Analyst, but my interest goes wider than testing alone. I enjoy understanding how software is built, how systems behave, how business requirements become working solutions and how quality helps protect the user experience.

LinkedIn Email Call GitHub CV

What I do

Testing, analysis and software thinking.

I am very interested in how Test Analysis and Business Analysis work together. A good solution needs clear requirements, thoughtful analysis, strong communication and careful testing. That combination is what makes software useful, reliable and easier for people to trust.

My background includes system analysis, software testing, API testing and coding exposure. I have coded in C#, Java and PHP, and I understand SQL, PSQL, Oracle Database and MySQL. I am also on a journey of learning automation so I can keep my coding skills active and relevant.
